scenarios.description: Custom TreeBuilder stub’s tag set is returned by tagSet() (delegation branch)
scenarios.precondition: Parser with a stub TreeBuilder that defines its own tags
scenarios.expectedResult: tagSet() returns exactly the stub’s defined tags
pseudocode: TEST TC08 tagSet delegates to custom TreeBuilder
// Arrange: create stub TreeBuilder that returns Set.of("X","Y","Z") in its tagSet method

scenarios.description: tagSet() reflects preserveCase change applied after first call (settings mutation branch)
scenarios.precondition: htmlParser with default settings, then settings changed to preserve case
scenarios.expectedResult: first call returns lower-case tags; second call returns mixed-case tags
pseudocode: TEST TC09 tagSet reflects dynamic settings change

scenarios.description: Modifying returned Set from tagSet() does not affect subsequent calls (defensive-copy branch)
scenarios.precondition: Parser.htmlParser() with default settings and lower-case tags
scenarios.expectedResult: mutation on returned Set does not change internal or future returned sets
pseudocode: TEST TC10 tagSet returns defensive copy
